name: opportunities.how-to-apply.backfill
description: Every 15 min — peels paywalled application instructions from opportunity descriptions via NVIDIA Build (INFERENCE_* on the crawler: integrate.api.nvidia.com / meta/llama-3.1-8b-instruct). Processes a small batch (limit=25) of active rows that lack how_to_apply. Idempotent: rows already peeld (how_to_apply set or attributes.how_to_apply_peel in none|ok) are skipped. Scales by raising limit or firing more often; uses the same inference tier as recipe generation.

steps.name: Peel how_to_apply batch via NVIDIA Build
